About.title: About Me
About.name: Haruka Kikuchi
About.messages:
Haruka is a photographer based between London and Tokyo. 

 Born in Hawaii and raised in Japan, she spent six years living in Taiwan, where she studied Communication and developed a strong interest in people, culture, and storytelling. After graduating, she built a career in marketing and business development within Japan’s technology industry, working with e-commerce platforms and creative entrepreneurs.

 Photography began as a personal interest and gradually became an important part of how she observes and connects with the world. Her work is shaped by experiences of living across different cultures and by a curiosity about the ways people express identity, build relationships, and find a sense of belonging.

 In 2026, she moved to London to study at the London Institute of Photography, further developing her practice in portraiture and documentary photography. Her work focuses on people, everyday life, and the moments that often go unnoticed, creating images that feel honest, thoughtful, and human.

She is currently working on personal documentary projects while continuing to explore stories across cultures and communities.
